name: treesession OpenClaw Plugin
description: Single-session auto topic routing and hierarchical context management middleware

routingStrategy.description: Routing strategy. 'hybrid' (default) uses fast keyword scoring with LLM fallback for ambiguous cases. 'score' is pure keyword-based (no model calls). 'model' always uses LLM. Model calls use the gateway loopback — no extra API key needed.

modelRoutingModel.description: Model for routing decisions. 'same' uses your onboarded model via the gateway.

modelRoutingBaseUrl.description: Override base URL for model routing. Not needed when using the gateway (default).

modelRoutingApiKey.description: Override API key for model routing. Not needed when using the gateway (default).

branchNamingModel.description: Model for branch naming. 'same' uses your onboarded model via the gateway.

branchNamingBaseUrl.description: Override base URL for branch naming. Not needed when using the gateway (default).

branchNamingApiKey.description: Override API key for branch naming. Not needed when using the gateway (default).
